content: All relative imports must end with .js extension (NodeNext module resolution). import { foo } from './bar.js' — not './bar' or './bar.ts'. Build will succeed without it but runtime will fail.
Ajv must be imported with ESM/CJS interop shim: import _Ajv from 'ajv'; const Ajv = _Ajv.default ?? _Ajv; — direct 'import Ajv from ajv' fails at runtime in ESM.
JSON schemas must live in .ts files (exported const), never .json files. tsc does not copy .json to dist/, so runtime import of a .json schema will 404.
Use process.exitCode = 1 instead of process.exit(1). Hard exit kills Vitest and prevents cleanup. exitCode lets the process finish naturally.
Ajv strict mode requires type: 'object' alongside required and properties in JSON schema definitions. Omitting type causes a strict mode warning that Ajv treats as error.
No any, no @ts-ignore, no @ts-expect-error. Strict mode is enforced. Fix the types instead of suppressing them.

description: Put JSON schema in a .json file. tsc compiled fine but runtime import failed — .json not copied to dist/.
resolution: Export schemas as const from .ts files (src/schemas/record-schema.ts). TypeScript compiles them into dist/ automatically.

description: import Ajv from 'ajv' compiled fine but threw 'Ajv is not a constructor' at runtime in ESM.
resolution: Use interop shim: import _Ajv from 'ajv'; const Ajv = _Ajv.default ?? _Ajv;

description: File /home/liker2/projects/os-eco/mulch/.overstory/worktrees/mulch-structured-records/schema-builder/src/schemas/record-schema.ts required 5 edits during session — high iteration suggests complexity
